name: End-of-The-Garden Pickles
recipeIngredient: 6 Cups Red And Green Bell Peppers, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first 6 ingredients and let stand overnight in refrigerator.
2. The following day, partially cook carrots, beans and cauliflower until they can be pierced with a fork. Do not overcook.
3. Drain liquid from both cooked and uncooked vegetables.
4. Combine all vegetables in a large kettle and add remaining ingredients.
5. Cook vegetables about 20 minutes, bringing to a full, rolling boil.
6. Pack pickles in sterilized jars and seal.
